title: melpomene firma
side_effects: Melpomene firma can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe nausea and vomiting due to its high levels of toxic alkaloids, and in extreme cases, it can cause liver damage and even death. Prolonged exposure to the plant's compounds can also lead to neurological issues, including tremors, seizures, and memory loss. Additionally, improper use of Melpomene firma can result in skin irritation, allergic reactions, and respiratory problems. It is essential to handle the plant with caution and consult a medical professional before using it for any health benefits.
